The '''''Flash Fire''''' was a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
After the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], she joined [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s fleet and was later heavily damaged during the [[Battle of Selaggis]] and destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
